name: cccat
description: Claude Code Cat — turn Claude Code's waiting moments into tiny English lessons, explained in your own language (Korean & Japanese), with a cute animated cat in your status line.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "process.stdout.write('
(=^_ω_^=) cccat 준비 완료 — 활성화: npx cccat install

')"

author: dkdannyboy
